title: abc9: Experiment with importing structural choices

features.name: module-level top attribute annotation
features.description: Code should include a module decorated with the (* top *) Verilog attribute to mark it as the top-level design entry point

features.name: packed vector ports with continuous multiplication assignment
features.description: Code should include 2-bit packed vector input ports and a continuous assignment that multiplies two packed vectors and drives an output wire of the same width

features.name: ANSI-style port list with wire types
features.description: Code should include a module with a non-ANSI port name list in the module header followed by separate input/output wire declarations in the body
